productDisplayName: Nike Women's Be Bold Navy Blue Track Pant
description: CompositionNavy blue pants made of 90% nylon and 10% spandex, with Dry-Fit technology, elasticated broad waistband and embroidered nike swoosh near the left waistFittingSlimWash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not use softeners Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Line dry Do not iron or dry clean Stylish to the T, these nylon pants from nike are designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort fit. Team it with Nike Sports tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
